summary.key_theme: NVIDIA 積極布局人形機器人與記憶體供應鏈，但受整體半導體板塊回調及市場對 AI 泡沫化的擔憂影響，股價呈現多空拉鋸。

bullish.title: Humanoid robotics company raises up to $1.4 billion from Nvidia, Amazon and others
bullish.reason: NVIDIA 透過投資 Neura Robotics 參與 14 億美元融資，顯示其在物理 AI 與人形機器人領域的戰略布局，有助於擴大 GPU 應用場景。

bullish.title: Nvidia Corp (NVDA) Strengthens AI Platform with Micron HBM4
bullish.reason: 與 Micron 合作導入 HBM4 記憶體，能有效提升 AI 資料中心平台的運算效能，鞏固其在硬體供應鏈的競爭優勢。

bullish.title: Nvidia (NVDA) Valuation Check After Major South Korea AI Memory And Data Center Agreements
bullish.reason: 與 SK hynix 簽署長期記憶體供應協議，確保了關鍵零組件的供應穩定性，對維持未來營收成長至關重要。

bullish.title: Nvidia Stock Trades Cheaper Than the S&P 500, and Looks Even More Like a Value Play
bullish.reason: 分析指出 NVIDIA 目前估值已低於 S&P 500 指數，具備價值投資吸引力，可能吸引長線資金進場。

bullish.title: SpaceX Just Announced Fantastic News to Nvidia Stock Investors
bullish.reason: Google 支付 SpaceX 9.2 億美元以獲取 GPU 算力，間接證明市場對 NVIDIA 高階 GPU 的強勁需求。

bullish.title: Nvidia is undervalued, says Wedbush's Matt Bryson
bullish.reason: Wedbush 分析師公開看好 NVIDIA 估值，為市場提供正面信心支撐。

bullish.title: AmpliTech Group (AMPG) Is Up 42.6% After Unique AI-RAN Open RAN Breakthrough With NVIDIA
bullish.reason: 與 AmpliTech 的技術突破顯示 NVIDIA 在 AI-RAN 領域的技術生態系持續擴張。

bullish.title: Jensen Huang Thinks the Artificial Intelligence (AI) Memory Boom Is Impossible to Ignore
bullish.reason: 執行長黃仁勳強調記憶體短缺將持續數年，暗示 NVIDIA 產品需求將維持長期高檔。

bearish.title: Stock Market Today, June 10: Super Micro Computer, Nvidia, Micron Fall as Risk-Off Mood Intensifies
bearish.reason: 受總體經濟風險與 Super Micro 拋售影響，AI 硬體板塊集體回調，市場避險情緒升溫。

bearish.title: Broadcom and AMD Sink 4%, NVIDIA Slides 3% as the Chip Selloff Deepens
bearish.reason: 半導體板塊出現賣壓，NVIDIA 股價隨大盤下跌，反映短期獲利了結壓力。

bearish.title: Michael Burry's NVDA, PLTR Shorts Are Paying Off—And More Trouble May Be Coming For AI Stocks
bearish.reason: 知名投資人 Michael Burry 的放空策略獲利，加劇市場對 AI 泡沫化的擔憂。

bearish.title: China's control over indium phosphide exports threatens AI data centre rollout
bearish.reason: 關鍵原料磷化銦出口受限，可能影響資料中心擴建進度，對 NVIDIA 供應鏈構成潛在風險。

bearish.title: Anti-Nvidia Data Center Startup Is Valued at $1.55 Billion in New Funding Round
bearish.reason: 競爭對手 TensorWave 獲得融資並採用 AMD 晶片，顯示市場出現針對 NVIDIA 的替代方案。

bearish.title: Jim Cramer Describes Bitcoin, Gold As 'Bad Money' Getting Dumped For SpaceX — But 'Good Money' Apple And Nvidia Not Spared Either
bearish.reason: 市場情緒轉弱導致優質股如 NVIDIA 也遭到拋售，反映市場流動性壓力。

neutral.title: Jim Cramer Says He Is Not Changing His “Own NVIDIA, Don’t Trade It” View
neutral.reason: Jim Cramer 重申長期持有觀點，對股價短期波動無直接影響。

neutral.title: NVIDIA’s (NVDA) CEO and South Korea’s SK Group Expected to Announce Collaboration Plans
neutral.reason: 此為預期中的合作消息，市場已部分反映，屬中性資訊。

neutral.title: NVIDIA Gets the Headlines, But Micron Could Offer More Upside
neutral.reason: 比較性分析，強調 Micron 的潛力，對 NVIDIA 本身無負面影響。

neutral.title: Amazon Is the Latest AI Giant to Sign a Blockbuster Deal With This Under-the-Radar Semiconductor Company
neutral.reason: 報導提及其他半導體公司與 Amazon 的合作，對 NVIDIA 市占率影響有限。

neutral.title: Tether, Nvidia and Amazon Back Humanoid Robotics Firm NEURA in $1.4 Billion Funding Round
neutral.reason: 與第一篇新聞重複，選定 CNBC 版本作為代表，此處歸類為中性重複資訊。

neutral.title: Neura Robotics Raises $1.4 Billion As Humanoid AI Race Accelerates
neutral.reason: 與第一篇新聞重複，歸類為中性重複資訊。
